LoginGet started

Explainable and Adaptive AI

Intelligent Preventive Healthcare Decision Support

Predict chronic disease risk, understand model explanations, simulate lifestyle improvements, and track preventive actions from a single dashboard.

Get StartedLogin

Predictive risk scoring

Multi-disease risk prediction with explainable AI insights.

Actionable recommendations

Personalized preventive goals, tasks, and lifestyle suggestions.

Report-ready insights

Download PDF summaries and share results with your care team.

What you get

Everything in one workspace—built for clarity, not clutter.

  • Multi-disease risk prediction with explainable AI insights.
  • Lifestyle simulation to compare risk before and after changes.
  • Task tracking with weekly completion and trend analytics.
  • Downloadable PDF reports for follow-up and consultation.

How it works

A simple loop: measure, interpret, and improve—without losing the human in the loop.

01

Assess

Enter your health inputs once. The system estimates risk using trained models with clear, reviewable outputs.

02

Understand

Review explanations and charts so you see what drove the prediction—not just a single score.

03

Act

Simulate changes, schedule preventive tasks, and export PDFs to discuss with your care team.

Ready to explore your preventive health picture?

Create a free account to run predictions, simulations, and weekly task tracking. Your data stays under your account for this demo environment.

Create accountI already have an account
PHPreventive Health

Explainable, adaptive tools for preventive healthcare planning. Use insights to support decisions alongside your clinician—not as a substitute for professional medical advice.

Not a medical device. Predictions are probabilistic and may be wrong—always consult a qualified professional for diagnosis and treatment.
